overviewPage.title: Your landing page workspace
overviewPage.description: Track real projects, pages, visitors, conversions, and available landing-page credits for this account.
overviewPage.recentProjectsDescription: The latest landing page workspaces in this account.
overviewPage.emptyDescription: Buy a landing page credit, then create your first project.
overviewPage.accountCapacityDescription: Current paid access and launch readiness.

projects.deleteDescription: This permanently removes the project and its pages from your workspace.
projects.description: Manage your landing page workspaces, organize campaigns, and keep launch surfaces tidy.
projects.emptyDescription: Adjust your search or create a new project to start fresh.
projects.renameDescription: Rename the project label used across your dashboard.
projects.title: Projects

settingsPage.title: Settings
settingsPage.description: Manage the account identity used across your dashboard.
settingsPage.securityDescription: Session and access controls are protected by Supabase.
settingsPage.name: Name

previewPage.title: Live Preview
previewPage.description: Preview structured AI landing page JSON across desktop, tablet, and mobile without entering editor mode.
previewPage.starterPreviewNotice: Showing the starter preview. Open a saved landing page from a project to preview the generated page.

analyticsPage.title: Analytics
analyticsPage.description: Track visits, conversions, devices, traffic sources, funnels, and AI-powered conversion recommendations.

publishingPage.title: Publishing & Domains
publishingPage.description: Publish landing pages, manage public URLs, configure custom domains, and tune SEO metadata for production delivery.
publishingPage.seoDescription: Metadata, Open Graph, Twitter cards, and indexing controls.
publishingPage.pagePublishedDescription: Your landing page is live and ready to share.
publishingPage.emptyPagesDescription: Publish a page from the editor and it will appear here.
publishingPage.metaPixelDescription: Connect a separate Meta Pixel to each published landing page by entering its numeric Pixel ID.
publishingPage.metaPixelEmpty: Publish a landing page first, then connect its Meta Pixel here.
publishingPage.metaPixelEvents: Automatically sends PageView, ViewContent, CTA click, and Lead events after visitor consent.
publishingPage.metaPixelSavedDescription: Tracking settings were updated for this landing page.
publishingPage.metaPixelSaveFailed: Meta Pixel could not be saved
publishingPage.metaPixelInvalid: Enter a valid numeric Pixel ID before enabling tracking.
publishingPage.privateSettingsDescription: Manage Meta Pixel, custom domain, and DNS instructions for this landing page only.
publishingPage.pageMetaPixelDescription: Add a Meta Pixel ID for this landing page only. Convertix injects the tracking code automatically when the page is opened.
publishingPage.pageDomainDescription: Connect a custom domain or subdomain to this landing page. Add the DNS records below at your domain provider.
publishingPage.domainInputHelp: Use your root domain without https://, or a subdomain such as shop.yourdomain.com.
publishingPage.domainCreatedDescription: DNS instructions were generated for this landing page.
publishingPage.domainStepProvider: 1. Sign in to your domain provider such as GoDaddy, Namecheap, or Cloudflare.
publishingPage.domainStepDns: 2. Open DNS settings or DNS management for the domain.
publishingPage.domainStepAddRecords: 3. Add the records below exactly as shown.
publishingPage.domainStepWait: 4. Save changes and wait for DNS propagation. It usually takes minutes, but can take up to 48 hours.
publishingPage.tiktokPixelDescription: Add a TikTok Pixel ID for this landing page only. Convertix loads TikTok tracking automatically after visitor consent.
publishingPage.snapchatPixelDescription: Add a Snapchat Pixel ID for this landing page only. Convertix loads Snap tracking automatically after visitor consent.
publishingPage.trackingPixelEvents: Automatically sends PageView, ViewContent, CTA click, and Lead-style events after visitor consent.
publishingPage.trackingPixelSavedDescription: Tracking settings were updated for this landing page.
publishingPage.trackingPixelInvalid: Enter a valid Pixel ID before enabling tracking.
publishingPage.dnsInstructionsIntro: Copy these values into your domain provider DNS settings. Do not add www when connecting the root domain.
publishingPage.domainApexNotice: For a root domain without www, use this A record.
publishingPage.domainSubdomainNotice: For a subdomain such as shop.yourdomain.com, use this CNAME record.
publishingPage.domainExampleApex: For yourdomain.com without www: host @, type A, value 76.76.21.21, and TTL 3600.
publishingPage.domainExampleSubdomain: For shop.yourdomain.com: host shop, type CNAME, value cname.vercel-dns.com, and TTL 3600.
publishingPage.domainVerificationAfterAdd: The verification token appears after adding the domain
publishingPage.pageUnpublishedDescription: The page is now a draft and the public URL is offline.
